items.name_en: 2024 Summer Resort Style New Shopping Bag Neverfull, Model: M23517, Original Leather, Full Steel Hardware.
items.name_cn:
2024 Summer Resort Style New Shopping Bag Neverfull, Model: M23517, Original Leather, Full Steel Hardware.
Neverfull Medium Bag M25317 Pink (Summer 2024)
Featuring a tote silhouette crafted from Monogram Tiles canvas, accented with leather trim outlining the top and handles. The central Circle logo complements the watercolor Monogram pattern, and the zippered pouch can be removed for separate use.
Size: 31 x 28 x 14 cm.

items.name_cn:
Fendi Small Monogram Tote "Sunshine Tote"
Classic double F monogram body, amber-colored double handles are the biggest focal point of the bag. Holding it by one handle gives a strong presence and doesn't dig into the hand. The overall vintage feel is super strong, very suitable for fashionistas who love vintage style. Highly recommended!
83293B Size 25.5x12x22.5

items.name_cn:
New Tote Bag🎉2VG119🎉🎉
This tote bag features a distinct architectural silhouette defined by geometric lines, cleverly combining aesthetics with functionality. Large capacity design with a woven handle, featuring two large practical side pockets. The practical Re-Nylon body is accented with leather details and a painted enamel triangular metal logo. Lightweight and practical. Guys, grab one now🎉🎉
31.5x42x17cm🎉🎉🎉👏👏👏

items.name_en: M24723 This OnTheGo Medium Tote from the LV By The Pool collection features a woven raffia tote silhouette. It can hold a 13-inch laptop and beach towel. The bag corners are reinforced with calfskin, complemented by the circular Louis Vuitton Paris plaque. 37.5 x 30 x 17 cm (L x H x W) d.950

items.name_en: M11734 Top-tier Original Blossom Small Tote Bag made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a perforated LV Circle pattern and a removable woven leather LV decoration on the front. Carry it as a handbag, elbow bag, shoulder bag, or crossbody bag using the handles or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap. 20.0 x 20.0 x 12.5 cm (L x H x W)
items.name_cn:
M11734 Top-tier Original Blossom Small Tote Bag made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a perforated LV Circle pattern and a removable woven leather LV decoration on the front. Carry it as a handbag, elbow bag, shoulder bag, or crossbody bag using the handles or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap. 20.0 x 20.0 x 12.5 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Perforated calfskin
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Magnetic snap closure
	•	Internal snap hook
	•	Removable zippered pocket secured by a strap
	•	Removable LV woven decoration
	•	Metal studs on the base
	•	Fits smartphone, compact wallet, keys, headphones, and lipstick
	•	Strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 52.0 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 59.0 cm
	•	Handles: Double handles

A must-have for fashionistas.

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
❤️【Lady Dior My ABC】'Black Patent'
/4-Compartment Lambskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty.
Exquisitely crafted from lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching and quilted details, this classic design is timeless.
Adorned with tonal enamel, lined with suede, and equipped with a chain shoulder strap and a zip pocket inside.
Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 20 x 8.5 x 17 cm
Model: 0538

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
The mini Saddle Bag 1955 series adds a mix-and-match vibe to this retro style series. This mini bag comes with two different shoulder straps; paired with a matching tone leather strap it presents a low-key elegant look, while paired with a red and green webbing strap it highlights the strong brand identity. The bag is made of double G interlocking pattern canvas, trimmed with brown leather.
Model: 658574 Full Leather
Dimensions: 20.5x14x5cm

Style No.: 602204, Dimensions: 25.5x18x6cm

Top Quality
【Top Grade】🎉2023 New Sparkling Three-in-One🎉1BH204🎉🎉 The shimmering Re-Edition 2005 mini bag is fully decorated with rhinestones, a new interpretation of the Prada classic silhouette, showcasing precious charm. This bag features an adjustable woven shoulder strap and chain handle, and comes with a matching small bag that can be hung on the strap for multiple ways to wear. Chic and cool, suitable for any occasion. The three-in-one viral element is recognized by influencers and celebrities, making it a forever hot item🙊🙊 worth buying👍 Ladies😘
Size: L22cm*H18cm*W6.5cm

items.name_en: 【Top Grade】🎉New Three-in-One🎉1B is here👏 This mini envelope bag features a front flap, with the iconic engraved logo embellishing the front, showcasing the brand's style. The magnetic closure design remains classic, and the woven strap transforms it into a crossbody or shoulder bag, paired with a small coin purse for versatile functionality and use as a clutch😘😘 The soft lambskin lining features a small pocket with a detachable mirror, a thoughtful design. Simple and stylish, ladies hurry up and get one🎉🎉🎉👏
